rankDesc.description:
Send Nanobots to an ally, healing them for 420 over 1 minute.

Nanobot Reconstruction can only be sent to 1 target at a time and cannot be dispelled.

nodes.name: Build: Restorative Beacon
nodes.desc: 3 Charges, 15 sec rechargeThrow down a restorative beacon for 15 seconds which projects a field that heals raid and party members in the area for 92 + 12% SP every 3 sec.

rankDesc.description:
3 Charges, 15 sec recharge
Throw down a restorative beacon for 15 seconds which projects a field that heals raid and party members in the area for 92 + 12% SP every 3 sec.

nodes.name: Mechanical Enhancements
nodes.desc: Increases all party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10%. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, the range of your offensive ranged abilities and Auto Shot is increased by 10 yds.

rankDesc.description:
Increases all party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, the range of your offensive ranged abilities and Auto Shot is increased by 10 yds.

nodes.name: Rockadier
nodes.desc: Empowers the next 6 Scrap Shots or Rocket Launchers within 30 seconds deal additional Fire damage equal to 100% of the damage dealt to up to 10 enemies around the target.

rankDesc.description: Empowers the next 6 Scrap Shots or Rocket Launchers within 30 seconds deal additional Fire damage equal to 100% of the damage dealt to up to 10 enemies around the target.

nodes.name: Build: Spider Bomb Factory
nodes.desc: Build a Spider Bomb Factory in front of you for 20 seconds.For the duration, Bomb Toss and Rocket Launcher will summon 3 Spider Bombs, that will immediately run towards your target and detonate dealing 250 + 30% ranged AP Fire damage.Using Scrap Shot will redirect the Spider Bombs to your new target.

rankDesc.description:
Build a Spider Bomb Factory in front of you for 20 seconds.

For the duration, Bomb Toss and Rocket Launcher will summon 3 Spider Bombs, that will immediately run towards your target and detonate dealing 250 + 30% ranged AP Fire damage.

Using Scrap Shot will redirect the Spider Bombs to your new target.

nodes.name: Nano-Repair Tech
nodes.desc: You and your pet now regenerate 3% of your maximum health every 8 sec.

rankDesc.description: You and your pet now regenerate 3% of your maximum health every 8 sec.

nodes.name: Eureka!
nodes.desc: Direct healing critical strikes now increase the healing done by your next Repair Shot or Emergency Heal by 30% for 10 seconds.

rankDesc.description: Direct healing critical strikes now increase the healing done by your next Repair Shot or Emergency Heal by 30% for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Build: Noise Box
nodes.desc: Build a Noise Box for 15 seconds that periodically unleashes screeching noise on nearby enemies, interrupting spellcasts and preventing spells of that school from being cast for 3 seconds.

rankDesc.description: Build a Noise Box for 15 seconds that periodically unleashes screeching noise on nearby enemies, interrupting spellcasts and preventing spells of that school from being cast for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Zap!
nodes.desc: Fires a long range zap of electricity that heals an ally for 254 + 150% healing.Scales with modifiers to Repair Shot.

rankDesc.description:
Fires a long range zap of electricity that heals an ally for 254 + 150% healing.

Scales with modifiers to Repair Shot.

nodes.name: Build: Battery Recharge Station
nodes.desc: Build a Battery Recharge Station for 30 seconds that allies can interact with once to replenish 15% maximum health and mana, and 50% maximum Rage, Energy, Focus, and Runic Power.Applies Depleting Battery to party and raid members within 40 yds.Depleting BatteryMovement speed increased by 10% for 30 seconds. Run to the Battery Recharge Station and charge your battery!Charged BatteryMovement speed increased by 30% for 12 seconds.

rankDesc.description:
Build a Battery Recharge Station for 30 seconds that allies can interact with once to replenish 15% maximum health and mana, and 50% maximum Rage, Energy, Focus, and Runic Power.

Applies Depleting Battery to party and raid members within 40 yds.
Depleting Battery
Movement speed increased by 10% for 30 seconds. Run to the Battery Recharge Station and charge your battery!
Charged Battery
Movement speed increased by 30% for 12 seconds.

nodes.name: Cybernetic Revivification
nodes.desc: All nearby allies receive 6% more healing. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, your Alarm Beacon now dispels fear, charm, and sleep effects from 1 additional ally.

rankDesc.description:
All nearby allies receive 6% more healing. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, your Alarm Beacon now dispels fear, charm, and sleep effects from 1 additional ally.

nodes.name: Rocket Turrets
nodes.desc: Allows Machine Synergy to stack 2 additional times and using Rocket Launcher now causes your Sentry Turret to also cast Rocket Launcher.Machine SynergyIncreases damage dealt by 5% and haste by 3%, stacking 3 times, for 6 seconds.

Allows Machine Synergy to stack 2 additional times and using Rocket Launcher now causes your Sentry Turret to also cast Rocket Launcher.
Machine Synergy
Increases damage dealt by 5% and haste by 3%, stacking 3 times, for 6 seconds.

nodes.name: Build: Firepot Drone

rankDesc.description:
3 Charges, 10 sec recharge
Build a Firepot Drone that flies towards your target, dropping a bomb along its path and exploding upon landing, dealing 182 + 17.5% ranged AP + 55% fire SP Fire damage in a 5 yd radius, leaving oil on the ground for 6 seconds that slows enemies within by -30%.

nodes.name: Deathball
nodes.desc: Launch 3 Deathballs in a line, increasing in speed the further they travel.They explode when they come into contact with an enemy, dealing 1150 + 35% ranged AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased based on distance traveled.Bot and Build abilities reduce the cooldown of this ability by -2 sec.

rankDesc.description:
Launch 3 Deathballs in a line, increasing in speed the further they travel.

They explode when they come into contact with an enemy, dealing 1150 + 35% ranged AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased based on distance traveled.

Bot and Build abilities reduce the cooldown of this ability by -2 sec.

nodes.name: Kinetic Shield
nodes.desc: Create magnetic shields of kinetic energy on an ally target for 8 seconds, reducing damage taken by -40% and making them immune to stun effects.Usable while stunned.

rankDesc.description:
Create magnetic shields of kinetic energy on an ally target for 8 seconds, reducing damage taken by -40% and making them immune to stun effects.

Usable while stunned.

nodes.name: Blazewrought Titan
nodes.desc: While inside your Mechsuit, all damage taken is reduced by -10% and dealing damage with Living Flame now grants a stack of Blazewrought Titan.Blazewrought TitanIncreases your magic penetration by -2 for 15 seconds, stacking 15 times. At 15 stacks, your damaging abilties become infused with fire dealing an additional 30% of the damage dealt instantly as Fire Damage and sundering your target and an additional nearby enemy.Blazewrought Sunder (Debuff)Increases your Fire and Nature Damage dealt to this target by 2% for 4 seconds, stacking 5 times.

rankDesc.description:
While inside your Mechsuit, all damage taken is reduced by -10% and dealing damage with Living Flame now grants a stack of Blazewrought Titan.
Blazewrought Titan
Increases your magic penetration by -2 for 15 seconds, stacking 15 times.

At 15 stacks, your damaging abilties become infused with fire dealing an additional 30% of the damage dealt instantly as Fire Damage and sundering your target and an additional nearby enemy.
Blazewrought Sunder (Debuff)
Increases your Fire and Nature Damage dealt to this target by 2% for 4 seconds, stacking 5 times.
